creator: wenzul@hotmail.com
text:
I am running FreeNAS-9.10-STABLE-201605021851 (10.3-STABLE) on a Fujitsu D3417-B1x mainboard. I think it's more a FreeBSD issue.
I am continuously getting the following errors from ACPI. These repeat every 10 seconds.

ACPI Error: Method parse/execution failed [\134_TZ_.TZ01._TMP] (Node 0xfffff8000
75be6c0), AE_NOT_FOUND (20150515/psparse-552)
acpi_tz1: error fetching current temperature -- AE_NOT_FOUND

Similar thread https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/31261/.

Thank you so much for an answer.
